not_configured: Home Assistant isn't set up yet. Add your server URL and access token in the skill settings.
unreachable_lan_hint: I couldn't reach Home Assistant — are you on your home network?
unauthorized: Home Assistant rejected the access token. It's worth regenerating it in your profile.
no_match: I couldn't find that in Home Assistant.
sign_in_incomplete: Sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
sign_in_no_browser: I couldn't open a browser to sign in.
sign_in_unverified: Sign-in couldn't be verified. Please try again.
sign_in_no_internet: Your Home Assistant couldn't complete sign-in — it may not be reachable from the internet. Use token authentication instead.
needs_reauth: I've lost my connection to Home Assistant — please sign in again in settings.
invalid_url: That doesn't look like a Home Assistant address. Check the server URL in settings.
